/usr/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler -g "--generate-code=arch=compute_70,code=[compute_70,sm_70]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_80,code=[compute_80,sm_80]" "--generate-code=arch=compute_90,code=[compute_90,sm_90]" -Xcompiler=-fvisibility=hidden -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink --options-file CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/deviceObjects1.rsp -o CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/cmake_device_link.o --options-file CMakeFiles/backwater_swe2d.dir/deviceLinkLibs.rsp
